---
title: "Demo Slides"
author: "Franz Zieris"
format: revealjs
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries
#| message: false
library(targets)
source("R/plot.R")
```

## Work Hours

```{r}
#| label: fig-java-whours
#| fig-cap: Work time spent on Java programs
#| warning: false
tar_read(data) |>
    plot_work_hours("Java")
```
